channel.description: Bash Labs Lab: View environment variables env printenvLab: Viewing Environment variable values View the value for the PATH variable echo $PATH View the value for the HOME variable echo $HOME View the value for the SHELL variable echo $SHELL View the value for the TERM variable echo $TERM View the value for the PPID variable echo $PPID View the value for the PS1 variable echo $PS1 View the value for the USER variable echo $USERLab: Setting and Unsetting Variables Define a local variable called VR1: VR1=RHEL9 View the value of VR1: echo $VR1 Type bash at the command prompt to enter a sub-shell and then run echo $VR1 to check whether the variable is visible in the sub-shell.
